adaptedResources.author: Microsoft Corporation
adaptedResources.description: The `VSCodeExtension` DSC Resource allows you to install, update, and remove Visual Studio Code extensions. This resource ensures that the specified Visual Studio Code extension is in the desired state.

Name.title: Name
Name.description: The name of the Visual Studio Code extension to manage. This is a required parameter.

Version.title: Version
Version.description: The version of the Visual Studio Code extension to install. If not specified, the latest version will be installed.

Exist.title: Exist
Exist.description: Indicates whether the extension should exist. The default value is `$true`.

PreRelease.title: PreRelease
PreRelease.description:
Indicates whether to install the pre-release version of the extension. The default value is `$false`.

    When PreRelease is set to `$true`, the extension will be installed from the Visual Studio Code marketplace. If the extension is already installed, it will be updated to the pre-release version.
    If there is no prerelease version available, the extension will be installed.

Insiders.title: Insiders
Insiders.description: Indicates whether to manage the extension for the Insiders version of Visual Studio Code. The default value is `$false`.

embedded.description: The `VSCodeExtension` DSC Resource allows you to install, update, and remove Visual Studio Code extensions. This resource ensures that the specified Visual Studio Code extension is in the desired state.
embedded.title: Microsoft.VSCode.Dsc/VSCodeExtension
